howItWorks.label: How it works
howItWorks.title: A unique personal song in 3 simple steps.
howItWorks.subtitle: No complicated process. Just clear, personal and focused on a great experience.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Fill in who the song is for, what the memories are and what atmosphere fits.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Romantic, emotional, cheerful or funny — you decide the direction.
howItWorks.step3Desc: We turn it into a song that feels like you wrote it yourself.

gift.label: What you give
gift.title: Not a gift from a shop. One that truly touches.
gift.subtitle: You give someone a song that is only about them. Their name, their story, their memories. Something they can listen to over and over again.
gift.point1: Made based on your personal story
gift.point2: Unique — no two songs are the same
gift.point3: Delivered within 10 minutes as an MP3

faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.q1: What does a personal song cost?
faq.a1: A fully personalised song costs €14.95. You pay once and receive your song within 10 minutes.
faq.q2: How quickly will I receive my song?
faq.a2: After your order you'll receive an MP3 by email within 10 minutes. Ready to give as a gift or keep.
faq.a3: The song is built entirely from your story, names, memories and the atmosphere you specify.
faq.q4: For which occasions does this work?
faq.a4: Birthdays, love, anniversaries, thank-yous, farewells or just as an original surprise.
faq.a5: We do everything we can to deliver a great result. See our terms and conditions for more information.
faq.q6: Which music styles can I choose from?
faq.a6: Pop, ballad, acoustic, jazz and fun — you choose the direction.
faq.q7: Can I give a song as a gift to someone else?
faq.a7: Yes. You fill in the story, we create the song, you give the gift.
faq.a8: Used only to create your song, not stored or shared afterwards.

qualityPromise.label: Quality guarantee
qualityPromise.title: Our quality promise
qualityPromise.description: Every order is personally reviewed by us within 48 hours. If the song doesn't meet our quality standards, you'll automatically receive two handcrafted songs including lyrics — free of charge and without you having to do anything.
qualityPromise.icon1Desc: Every song is listened to and assessed by our team
qualityPromise.icon2Desc: You'll know quickly whether everything is perfect
qualityPromise.icon3Desc: Not satisfied? You'll receive a handcrafted alternative

terms.article1Body: Lyrics, music and any additional content are generated entirely or partially using artificial intelligence (AI), based on the information you provide. Songfactory provides a best-effort obligation, not a result obligation.
terms.article2Body: Every song is subjective and creative in nature. Differences in style, tone, voice and interpretation are inherent to the process and do not constitute a valid reason for rejection, cancellation or refund.
terms.article3Body: Upon delivery you receive a personal, non-exclusive and non-transferable licence for private purposes. Commercial use is not permitted without written consent.
terms.article4Body: If you wish to use the song commercially, you must contact us in advance for an additional licence agreement.
terms.article5Body: You are fully responsible for the content, accuracy and lawfulness of the information provided.
terms.article6Body: Songfactory carries out a personal quality check within 48 hours of delivery for every order. If the delivered song does not meet our quality standards, you will receive two handcrafted alternatives including lyrics free of charge. This quality guarantee applies solely on the basis of objective quality criteria and not on the basis of personal taste or preference.
terms.article7Body: If Songfactory determines after quality control that the delivered product does not meet reasonable quality standards in terms of pronunciation, musical quality or technical execution, Songfactory will proactively contact the customer and deliver two new songs including lyrics free of charge. The customer does not need to take any action for this.
terms.article8Body: Delivery times are indicative. Delays do not give the right to cancellation, compensation or refund.
terms.article9Body: After the creative process has started, cancellation is no longer possible. After delivery, refunds are excluded.
terms.article10Body: The generated content is intended exclusively for entertainment and creative purposes.
terms.article11Body: Songfactory is not liable for direct or indirect damages. Total liability is limited to the amount paid.
terms.article12Body: Songfactory is not responsible for compatibility, download issues or external services.
terms.article13Body: Songfactory may use anonymised parts for portfolio and marketing purposes, unless the customer objects in advance.
terms.article14Body: Songfactory is not liable for failures in AI systems, technical problems or outages from external suppliers.
terms.article15Body: In cases of misuse or fraud, Songfactory reserves the right to cancel orders without refund.
terms.article16Body: Songfactory reserves the right to amend these terms at any time. The most current version is always available at songfactory.eu/algemene-voorwaarden.

giftcard.title: Give a song as a gift
giftcard.subtitle: A unique, personalised song as an unforgettable gift. The recipient chooses the style and tells the story — we create the song.
giftcard.featuresTitle: What's included in the gift card?
giftcard.feature2: Professional lyrics based on the recipient's story
giftcard.feature3: Choice of 9 music styles, 10 moods and 3 voice options
giftcard.feature4: Delivered as MP3 by email — within 10 minutes
giftcard.feature5: Unique redemption code, valid for one order
giftcard.howItWorksBody: After payment you receive an email with the unique code. Forward that code to the recipient. They enter it at step 1 of the order form and the payment is automatically skipped.
giftcard.errorEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
giftcard.errorGeneral: Something went wrong. Please try again.

giftcardSucces.title: Payment successful!
giftcardSucces.body: Your gift card is being created. Within a few minutes you'll receive an email with the unique code and instructions.
giftcardSucces.info: Forward the code to the recipient — they can redeem it at step 1 on songfactory.eu/bestellen
